zh.lifeSummary: 當Lettice Wettenhall於大約1325年出生在英國爾時，她的父親William de Wetenhall18歲，母親Ellen Bulkeley17歲。她於大約1388年與William Praers在英國結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1395年在英國英格蘭爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lettice Wettenhall于大约1325年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲William de Wetenhall18岁，母亲Ellen Bulkeley17岁。她于大约1388年与William Praers在英国结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1395年在英国英格兰爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lettice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval vernacular form of the Latin name   Laetitia .  It was in use in Britain in the Middle Ages, but then fell out of use until revived by the Victorians. It is now once again out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lettice Wettenhall was born about 1325, in Cheshire, England, her father, William de Wetenhall, was 18 and her mother, Ellen Bulkeley, was 17. She married William Praers about 1388, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died about 1395, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lettice Wettenhall est née environ 1325, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Wetenhall, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Ellen Bulkeley, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William Praers environ 1388, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1395, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lettice Wettenhall um 1325 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Wetenhall 18 und ihre Mutter Ellen Bulkeley 17. Sie hat um 1388 in England William Praers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1395 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice Wettenhall è nata il circa 1325 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, William de Wetenhall, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Ellen Bulkeley, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William Praers circa 1388, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì circa 1395, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lettice Wettenhallが約1325年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Wetenhallは18歳，母Ellen Bulkeleyは17歳であった。約1388年にイギリスでWilliam Praersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1395年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lettice Wettenhall(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Wetenhall(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Bulkeley(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1388년 영국에서 William Praers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice Wettenhall nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Wetenhall, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Bulkeley, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William Praers aproximadamente 1388, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1395, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lettice Wettenhall родилась около 1325 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Wetenhall было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Bulkeley, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Praers около 1388 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1395 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.about 1325–about 1395: e tusa o le 1325–e tusa o le 1395

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lettice Wettenhall nació aproximadamente 1325, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Wetenhall, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Ellen Bulkeley, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William Praers aproximadamente 1388, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1395, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
